caption: A man is seated in a room that appears to be a store or a studio, surrounded by walls decorated with framed photographs and clothing. He wears a distinctive, tall, grey, pointed wig, glasses, over-ear headphones, a white long-sleeved button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. In front of him is a professional microphone on a boom arm. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left reading "FESTALBIO PODCAST" and text on the right that says "GOSS TALK JOY" with smaller text below reading "LIFE'S UNFILTERED". As the sequence progresses, the man is seen talking and shifting his head slightly. In the later frames, another person wearing a black long-sleeved shirt is partially visible in the background, sitting behind him and looking toward the left of the scene.
